title: Professional Field Brew Station Repair Service
problem_or_desire: Machine downtime disproportionately impacting revenue during slow maintenance call-outs from established vendors
core_concept: Rapid-response modular machine heart swaps and standardized component library to reduce technical failure periods
proposed_approach: Aggregator of independent master electricians trained in industry equipment, utilizing modular chassis exchange rather than deep in-store diagnostics
prototype_scope: Testing speed-to-solution with five broken commercial devices by delivering serviced, reconditioned replacement module parts

title: Brand Integrity Monitoring
target_user: Service providers with paid media ads
problem_or_desire: Brand advertising displaying alongside unsuitable or scammy link farms
core_concept: Monitoring mechanism specific to detecting when client URLs are appearing on bad reputation host platforms
proposed_approach: Exclusion list sync protocol keeping ad-network blocks consistent across platforms
prototype_scope: Report utility highlighting current placements to the store owner once per month

title: Multi-Channel Feedback Resolver
problem_or_desire: Rapid identification of recurring regional training lapses reported in informal channels.
core_concept: Aggregating and categorizing feedback from disparate sources to identify training lapses.
proposed_approach: A tool that categorizes feedback into predefined buckets to help managers spot trends.
prototype_scope: A dashboard that ingests feedback from two sources and displays a categorized frequency chart. | Define feedback categories; Build ingestion for two sources; Implement categorization logic; Create dashboard

title: Coffee-Based Networking Events
problem_or_desire: Isolation and lack of professional networking opportunities
core_concept: Curated morning coffee meetups where participants are matched based on professional interests
proposed_approach: Facilitated small-group coffee tastings at local cafes
prototype_scope: Two events with 10 participants each to test matching logic

title: Affiliate Onboarding Concierge
problem_or_desire: Zero experience or manual friction in onboarding new affiliate partners
core_concept: Templatized onboarding workflows for SaaS affiliate programs.
proposed_approach: A service providing standardized onboarding documentation and CRM templates for small SaaS companies to manage affiliate partners.
prototype_scope: Create a digital kit of templates and a 3-video training suite. | Draft onboarding templates.; Record 3 training videos.; Package as a digital product.; Test with 3 beta users.

title: Digital Asset Legacy Planner
problem_or_desire: Ensuring digital assets are accessible to heirs after death
core_concept: A secure, time-locked digital vault that releases access credentials to designated beneficiaries
proposed_approach: A dead-man's switch mechanism that triggers notification and release after a period of inactivity
prototype_scope: A basic web interface that allows users to store encrypted text and set a trigger date

title: BotanicTrack
problem_or_desire: Difficulty tracking plant growth performance compared to recommended care
core_concept: Visualization-heavy comparison interface between 'optimal' vs. 'attained' progress steps
proposed_approach: Data-heavy tracking focused solely on height metrics over fixed duration time intervals
prototype_scope: Form fields for recording plant dimensions weekly, displaying line graphs against ideal biological grow trajectories

title: Virtual Cooking Class Kits
problem_or_desire: Lack of engaging, interactive culinary experiences at home.
core_concept: A kit containing pre-measured ingredients and a live, interactive video link to a professional chef.
proposed_approach: Ship kits to arrive on the day of a scheduled live-streamed group cooking session.
prototype_scope: A single event for 10 couples using a pre-recorded video and shipped ingredient boxes.

title: Institutional Waste Conversion Catering
problem_or_desire: Requirement to serve ethical, low-impact high-quality group catering
core_concept: Catering using 'ugly' or near-expiry bulk ingredients.
proposed_approach: A boutique catering service sourcing ingredients from local produce markets' end-of-day surplus.
prototype_scope: Prepare and serve 5 lunches using ingredients purchased at a discount from a local market at closing time. | Identify local market surplus schedule; Design menu based on available 'ugly' produce; Execute 5 lunch deliveries; Survey recipients on quality perception

title: Inter-App Knowledge Scavenger
problem_or_desire: Duplicate information creation where project context is scattered between messenger apps and whiteboard collaboration tools.
core_concept: Summarizing chat discussions and linking them to project management tickets.
proposed_approach: A tool that allows users to select chat messages and push them as comments to a project management ticket.
prototype_scope: A Slack/Teams bot that lets users click a 'save to ticket' button on a message. | Build chat bot integration; Implement ticket API connection; Create 'save' action; Test with one PM tool
